name: skip-at-contact-must-not-pop-undo
description: Regression: 'skip' at WEB_COLLECT_CONTACT must advance the flow forward (or stay in contact for re-prompt), NEVER trigger undo and pop the user back to an earlier collection state. The earlier bug: undo classifier returned 'undo' for the bare word 'skip', sending the user backward into a skip-undo loop.
